function.name: apis.simple_note.search_notes
function.description: Search your notes. This will not show contents of the notes. Pinned notes will be shown first by default, except when dont_reorder_pinned is true.

access_token.description: Access token obtained from simple_note app login.

tags.description: Tags to filter the notes by. Notes not having any of these tags will be filtered out.

dont_reorder_pinned.description: If true, pinned notes will not be reordered to be shown at the top.

page_index.description: The index of the page to return.

page_limit.description: The maximum number of results to return per page.

sort_by.description: The attribute to sort the notes by prefixed with +/- to reflect ascending/descending. Valid attributes: created_at and updated_at. If both query and sort_by are given and non-empty, results will be first ranked by query relevance, then paginated, and will then be sorted by the given attribute within each page. If both query and sort_by are not given, null, or empty, sort_by will default to -updated_at.
